seo.title: Terms & Conditions | Net eSIM
seo.description: Net eSIM terms of use - guidelines and conditions for using our eSIM services.

hero.title: Terms & Conditions
hero.description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using the Net Sim website or application or purchasing any eSIM package.
hero.notice: By using Net Sim services, you agree to be bound by the terms and conditions outlined on this page.

service-desc.label: Service Description
service-desc.title: 1. Service Description
service-desc.body: Net Sim provides digital mobile connectivity services using eSIM technology. Users may purchase mobile data packages which can be installed on compatible devices through digital activation.

user-resp.label: User Responsibilities
user-resp.title: 2. User Responsibilities
user-resp.body: Users are responsible for ensuring that their devices support eSIM functionality before purchasing any services from Net Sim.

service-avail.label: Service Availability
service-avail.title: 3. Service Availability
service-avail.body: NET NOVA GROUP LTD reserves the right to modify, update, or discontinue services at any time without prior notice.

refund-policy.label: Refund Policy
refund-policy.title: 5. Refund Policy
refund-policy.body: Refunds are only issued in specific technical cases where it is proven that we were unable to provide the service.
